title: Module 1
content:
The generalized measurement system, direct comparison and indirect
comparison, types of input quantities, measurement standards, uncertainty,
introduction to uncertainty , propagating uncertainty Kline and Mclintock
approach. Simple problems in uncertainty. Vernier calliper- principle and
measurement. Micrometer parts-measurements.

title: Module 2
content:
Displacement measurement- strain gauge type, Inductance type, Capacitance
type, Eddy current type, Measurement of force- Analytical balance, Spring
balance, Load cells- Magneto-elastics load cell, piezo-electric type, Elastic
load cell, Velocity measurement- Capacitive tacho, Drag-cup type tacho.
Acceleration- null balance accelerometer. Measurement of torque – Torque
measurement by relative angular twist.

title: Module 3
content:
Linear and angular measurement;- Linear displacement transducer- Moire
fringe techniques, slip gauges stack of slip gauge; method of selecting slip
gauges; adjustable slip gauge; Measurement of angles; sine bar checking
unknown angles; sine center; sources of error; angle gauges.Basic acoustical
parameters. Sound measuring apparatus and techniques. Basic theory of
sesmic instrument. Detection of nuclear radiation-GM counter, Ionization
chamber, Scintillation counter etc, Measurement of solar radiation.

title: Module 4
content:
Fluid Mechanics - Fluid properties, density, surface tension, capillarity and
viscosity. Newton’s law of viscosity. Fluid Statics- Basic equations of fluid
flow- continuity, momentum and energy equations, Applications of
Bernoulli’s equations- venturimeter, orifice meter, flow nozzles and Pitot-
tube. Hot wire anemometer.
measurement of surface roughness – surface texture – primary texture –
secondary texture and the lay specification for surface textures – methods of
measuring surface finish . The Talysurf instrument – the profilograph –
Tomlinson surface meter – Tracer type profilograph-gear tooth measurement-
tooth thickness-tooth spacing-pitch circle diameter-parkinsons gear tester
